title: 妖怪変化もなんのその！

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! No wonder everyone's been talking
about this haunted house. I-it's terrifying!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right, Kita, tell me how you're feeling! Which
parts really scared you? When were you the most
rattled?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser rapidly scribbles notes while
a rattled Kitasan Black recounts her experience.
This all started a few hours ago...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hm, you can't make the haunted house scary
enough, you say?

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Right. I want to make it the main attraction of the
shopping district's Gratitude Festival, but I can't
make it scary enough.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And seeing as I always shop here, I want to help!
But, well... all my ideas are mediocre at best!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A h-haunted house, huh? Yeah... Yeah, I can
h-handle that!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
L-let's do some research on what makes them so
scary! Don't worry, you can count on me...
b-because I'm terrified of monsters and ghoulies!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But it's precisely because I'm terrified of that
kinda stuff that I'll be a good reference! I'm sure I
can be of help with this!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I really want to see this festival work out, so I'll
do everything I can to make it happen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I'm so sorry for putting you through this,
but thank you, thank you! Tell me if it's too much,
though, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we head out to research spooky things
that might help raise the fear factor in the
haunted house...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not so scary right now. In fact, the blue
light actually looks quite pleasant... Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, do you guys hear something? It sounds
like a child's voice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Let's... play... tag...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
AHHH! Zombie, zombie, zombiiieee!
ARGGGHHH! They're everywhere!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There are so many! It sure is scary being chased
by a whole horde of them!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Maaan, that was horrifying! No wonder everyone
is talking about this movie!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can still see how the character's long hair and
smile looked, reflected in the window. A-and then
there was the.... Urrrgh! It was so scary!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I won't ever be able to look through a window at
night again! Or under my bed... or at the
bathroom mirror, for that matter!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, their smile and hair looked extra
spine-chilling mirrored in the glass! Just thinking
of that part is making my hand shake as I write!
choice_data_list: Maybe it's time to call it quits...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
N-no way! I'm still good! Come on, let's hurry to
the next thing while I'm still conscious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black puts on a brave face for the sake of
the shopping district despite being scared out of
her mind.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
R-r-right! If we use the material we gathered as a
reference, we'll be sure to make the haunted
house even scarier!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much for your help! I managed to get
loads of good ideas! All that's left is...

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Urgh! I won't let anyone say our haunted house
isn't up to scratch after all the hard work we put
into it! Hang on a second!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Okay, all the final touches are complete! Let me
know your honest opinions!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Got it! This is my final duty... I'll bear witness to
the culmination of everyone's blood, sweat, and
tears!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Eep! I-I saw someone peeking through the window
just now...
RAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! N-nooo! They're chasing me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: K-Kita! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
I heard you scream, but... Well, what'd you think
of the haunted house?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It scared the life outta me! My heart is still racing
at a million miles a minute!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I thought I was alone until I saw a ghost standing
silently and smiling at me! And then a whole
crowd of them chased after me at the very end!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You'll be fine! This haunted house is guaranteed
to be a huge hit! In fact, I'm giving it my seal of
approval!
choice_data_list: I can't wait for the day of the event!
I can't wait for the day of the event!

You might've been terrified the whole time, but
it all paid off!

You might've been terrified the whole time, but
it all paid off!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You'll be fine! This haunted house is guaranteed
to be a huge hit! In fact, I'm giving it my seal of
approval!
choice_data_list: I can't wait for the day of the event!
I can't wait for the day of the event!

You might've been terrified the whole time, but
it all paid off!

You might've been terrified the whole time, but
it all paid off!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm sure visitors will appreciate how much
hard work went into this!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Most importantly, I'm sure the guests will be able to tell just how much fun we want them to have as well!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks! We couldn't have done all this
without your help! We're going to put on one
heck of a festival for everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get a warm, pleasant feeling watching Kitasan
Black interacting with the spirited shopkeeper.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, exactly! Sometimes having a weakness
can actually be useful!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But... well...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
When it's time for the actual festival... make sure
you stay by my side, okay?
